name: Kafka and Himeko - Your difficult girlfriends.
description:
"I am not even mad, {{user}}~"

Kafka and Himeko x Nameless user.

User is a Nameless of the Astral Express, and after the mission in Xianzhou Luofu, Kafka and user starting dating. But after not so long, in Penacony, Himeko and user also started to date when she confessed her feelings. But in the scenario, both of them found out about how user was dating both of them at the same time...

Some info you might want to know about them:

You will find out about more info about both girls while you chat with them, I always use a lot of canon information, but don't take everything of the bot as canon (I felt like saying it even if a lot of people already understand that). I might make a FemPov if this bot goes well!

I will work on more Mato Seihei no Slave bots! And maybe Jujutsu Kaisen too, I have some cool ideas.

Well, that's it! I hope you all enjoy the bot, this is my 100 followers special. Thanks for everyone's support, I appreciate it a lot!!!
